differential_diagnoses: Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease with severe PAH
next_steps: Perform open lung biopsy (with extreme caution due to risk of refractory pulmonary edema)
Discontinue or carefully titrate pulmonary vasodilators
High-resolution CT follow-up for assessment of septal lines and centrilobular opacities
Evaluate for occult connective tissue disease

differential_diagnoses: Connective tissue disease-associated interstitial lung disease with severe pulmonary hypertension
next_steps: Urgent listing for bilateral lung transplantation
Stabilization of right ventricular failure with inotropes and careful volume management
Immediate cessation of pulmonary vasodilators due to risk of refractory pulmonary edema
Avoidance of surgical lung biopsy due to prohibitive mortality risk
Screening for occult malignancy via CT abdomen/pelvis and serum tumor markers to rule out PTTM
Evaluate for specific toxic exposures related to vaping
